summary: Phase 8 Notifications and Messages features testing completed. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend features verified. New features: Notifications dropdown in header, Messages page with conversations, Chat functionality in FriendsPage.
passed_tests: Backend API Tests (12/12 passed):
- GET /api/notifications - returns list of notifications
- GET /api/notifications/unread/count - returns unread count
- POST /api/notifications/read-all - marks all as read
- GET /api/notifications requires authentication
- GET /api/messages/conversations - returns list of conversations
- POST /api/messages - sends message successfully
- GET /api/messages/{friend_id} - returns messages with friend
- GET /api/messages/unread/count - returns unread messages count
- Conversations list includes friend with lastMessage after messaging
- POST /api/messages rejects empty message (400)
- GET /api/messages/conversations requires authentication
- Notification created on quest invitation acceptance with correct structure (type, title, message, data)
Frontend UI Tests:
- Notifications button (bell icon) with data-testid='notifications-button' - VERIFIED
- Messages button (bubble icon) with data-testid='messages-button' - VERIFIED
- Notifications dropdown opens with title 'Сповіщення' - VERIFIED
- Notifications dropdown shows empty state 'Немає нових сповіщень' - VERIFIED
- Notifications dropdown has 'Перейти до квестів' link - VERIFIED
- Messages button navigates to /messages page - VERIFIED
- Messages page has 'Діалоги' section - VERIFIED
- Messages page has search input - VERIFIED
- Messages page shows empty state 'Немає діалогів. Напишіть другу!' - VERIFIED
- Messages page shows 'Виберіть діалог зліва' placeholder - VERIFIED
- Back button navigates to dashboard - VERIFIED
- FriendsPage has 'Написати' button for each friend - VERIFIED (code review)
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationsDropdown correctly fetches notifications and quest invitations
Unread count includes both notifications and pending quest invitations
MessagesPage correctly displays conversations with last message and unread count
FriendsPage has ChatWindow component for inline messaging
Notification model has all required fields: type, title, message, data, read, createdAt
Notification is created when quest invitation is accepted (type: quest_invite_accepted)
seed_data_creation: Test users created for backend tests: TEST_notif_user1_*, TEST_notif_user2_*, TEST_quest_owner_*, TEST_quest_friend_*. Friendships established between test users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 Notifications and Messages features implemented and working: 1) GET /api/notifications - list notifications, 2) GET /api/notifications/unread/count - unread count (includes pending quest invitations), 3) POST /api/notifications/read-all - mark all as read, 4) GET /api/messages/conversations - list all conversations with lastMessage and unreadCount, 5) POST /api/messages - send message, 6) GET /api/messages/{friend_id} - get messages with friend, 7) Notification created on quest invitation acceptance with type='quest_invite_accepted'. Frontend: NotificationsDropdown in Dashboard header shows notifications and quest invitations, Messages button navigates to /messages page, MessagesPage shows all conversations, FriendsPage has 'Написати' button that opens ChatWindow for inline messaging. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_notifications_messages.py.
